instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

policy.clause: A digital replica may not be used in an election-related digital replica.

novel_categories.summary: Use of a digital replica in election-related content or contexts, including synthetic likenesses deployed to influence, impersonate, or misrepresent candidates, voters, or election participants.
novel_categories.policy_fragment: used in an election-related digital replica

novel_categories.reasoning: This is a concrete synthetic-media misuse in an election context. No existing leaf squarely covers use of a digital replica in election-related content or contexts.
